axis_extremum_label: Look only at {query_axis} "{axis_label}". What {answer_axis} label contains the {extremum_phrase}? {unanswerable_instruction}
For {query_axis} "{axis_label}", what {answer_axis} label has the cell with the {extremum_phrase}? {unanswerable_instruction}
Within the {query_axis} labeled "{axis_label}", which {answer_axis} has the {extremum_phrase}? {unanswerable_instruction}
What {answer_axis} label corresponds to the {extremum_phrase} in {query_axis} "{axis_label}"? {unanswerable_instruction}
off_diagonal_confusion_label: For actual class "{row_label}", ignoring the diagonal cell, which predicted column has the largest printed count?
In the row for actual class "{row_label}", exclude the matching diagonal cell. What predicted column label has the largest count?
Look across actual class "{row_label}" and ignore the diagonal. Which predicted column label is highest?
For the actual-class row "{row_label}", which off-diagonal predicted column has the largest printed value?
Ignoring the correct-class diagonal cell for actual class "{row_label}", which predicted label has the highest count?
threshold_cell_count: In {query_axis} "{axis_label}", how many active cells have printed values {comparison_phrase}?
Look only at {query_axis} "{axis_label}". Count the active cells with values {comparison_phrase}.
For {query_axis} "{axis_label}", how many printed values are {comparison_phrase}?
Within the {query_axis} labeled "{axis_label}", how many active cells satisfy {comparison_phrase}?
Count the cells in {query_axis} "{axis_label}" whose printed values are {comparison_phrase}.

query:axis_extremum_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible row or column label as a string
query:axis_extremum_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes for all candidate cells in the selected row or column

query:off_diagonal_confusion_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible predicted column label as a string
query:off_diagonal_confusion_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes for the off-diagonal candidate cells in the actual-class row

query:threshold_cell_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested cell count as an integer
query:threshold_cell_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel boxes for the cells matching the threshold
